question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 11, 2AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - February 10, 2:30AM-2:45AM ET
description:

The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 36.5 in Game 3?
description:
In the upcoming match between Top Esports and Team WE in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 9 at 1:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 3.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 3 is 37 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

This market refers to the LoL match between Top Esports and Team WE in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 10 at 1:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Top Esports" if Top Esports win the match against Team WE.

This market will resolve to "Team WE" if Team WE win the match against Top Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 48.5 in Game 3?
description:
In the upcoming match between Top Esports and Team WE in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 9 at 1:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 3.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 3 is 49 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 11, 4AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 4 is 28 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be 8°C or below on February 11?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 11 Feb '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Spread: Navy Midshipmen (-7.5)
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for February 9 at 6:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Navy Midshipmen" if the Navy Midshipmen win the game by 8 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Bucknell Bison". 

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Navy Midshipmen vs. Bucknell Bison
events.description:
This event is for the CBB game between Navy Midshipmen and Bucknell Bison on February 9 at 6:00 PM ET.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

question: Cavaliers vs. Nuggets: O/U 236.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for February 9 at 9:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Cavaliers and Nuggets combine to score 237 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 237, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Cavaliers vs. Nuggets
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for February 9 at 9:00PM ET:

If the Nuggets win, the market will resolve to "Nuggets".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 32.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Invictus Gaming and Ninjas in Pyjamas in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 9 at 6:15AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 33 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: LoL: Invictus Gaming vs Ninjas in Pyjamas (BO5) - LPL Knights Rivals
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Invictus Gaming and Ninjas in Pyjamas in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 10 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Invictus Gaming" if Invictus Gaming win the match against Ninjas in Pyjamas.

This market will resolve to "Ninjas in Pyjamas" if Ninjas in Pyjamas win the match against Invictus Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Will the Bad Bunny Apple Music Super Bowl Halftime Show video get less than 30 million views on day 1?
description:
This market will resolve according to the number of views the 'Bad Bunny's Apple Music Super Bowl Halftime Show' video (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G6FuWd4wNd8), posted by the NFL's YouTube channel, gets in the first 24 hours after being posted. This market may not resolve until the 24 hours are complete, regardless of whether a strike is reached earlier.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The resolution source for this market is the NFL's YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/@NFL/videos), specifically the 'views' counter for the described video.

Note: This market refers to the NFL's specified video posted. Shorts, previews, or other videos released other than the referenced video will not be considered.

question: Map Handicap: PHA (-1.5) vs WHITEBIRD (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Phantom and WHITEBIRD in the CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage, scheduled for February 9 at 7:10AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Phantom" if Phantom wins 2 or more maps than WHITEBIRD in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "WHITEBIRD".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
